title: Monday Vibe - Be able to lock views from other user deletion

posts.author: beth1021 (Elisabeth Juliano)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would love it if there was a way for me to lock Vibe’s view in boards down even from other owners of the board or for the Vibe View tab to not show at all until fully published.

What are you trying to achieve

I was showing a colleague what I was working on in Vibe. Even though Vibe showed notifications that it was a draft and I should be the only one who has access to see it, my colleague could see the view in the associated board. It then also gave her the option to “Delete View.”

I quickly renamed the view to show “DO NOT DELETE” for anyone looking at the board, however I would love it if there was a way for me to lock it down even from owners of the board, or for the view tab to not show at all until fully published.

posts.author: amichay (Amichay Even Chen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! Thanks for the feedback. We are looking at options to hide the new board view tab completely until the vibe is published, but it’s not possible right now.

Note that even if you or another user deletes the view you can add it back by via the “add view” menu
